message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #222
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #222
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFED6
  NoteBorderColor #888
  ArrowColor #222
}

actor Admin
participant "Sqoop" as Sqoop
database "Metastore DB" as MetastoreDB
artifact "HDFS" as HDFS
participant "Hive SQL" as HiveSQL
database "Hive" as Hive
participant "Hive Table" as HiveTable
participant "Ambari" as Ambari

== Pre Upgrade Planning Setup ==
Admin -> Sqoop : Run "Collect the Metadata"
Sqoop -> MetastoreDB : Extracts from
Sqoop -> HDFS : Saves to
Admin -> Hive : Run "Build Supporting Tables"

== Pre Upgrade Planning ==
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Distinct Serdes"
Admin -> HiveTable : Fix Tables with Serde Issues
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Check Partition Location"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Non-Managed Table Locations"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Managed Table Locations"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Missing HDFS Directories Check"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Correct "Missing Directories"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Table Migration Check"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Acid Table Conversions"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Conversion Table Directories"

== Pre Upgrade Compaction ==
note left of Admin
This process should be run several days
BEFORE the actual upgrade to reduce the downtime
of the upgrade.

And should be run just BEFORE the upgrade and
AFTER all users have been cleared from the system
to ensure no tables are modified after this runs.
end note

Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Acid Table Compaction Check"
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Acid Table Compaction Required"
Admin -> Hive : TUNE THE COMPACTOR for estimated compaction needs
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run the compaction script.  Break it apart if needed.

== Post Upgrade Planning ==
Admin -> HiveSQL : Run "Acid Table Locations".  Save artifact for Upgrade.

== Upgrade ==
Admin -> Admin : Review and Run ALL previous steps\nand collect details.
Admin -> Admin : Decision to intervene with Ambari Process\nbased on volumes indicated through research
Admin -> Ambari : Hack Pre/Post Processes
Admin -> Admin : Run Compaction Routine one last time.
Admin -> Admin : Start Upgrade
Admin -> Admin : Run the Post Upgrade Planning Output to convert tables.
Admin -> Ambari : Complete Upgrade

@enduml
```
